notes: friend recommended a security review before launch; user asks whether they need one

messages.content: my friend who works in tech looked at my app for 2 minutes and said get a security review before you launch. do I really need that?
It depends on what the app handles. What kind of data do your users store in it, and are you taking payments?
people store their clients' contact info and contracts, and yeah there's a paid plan through stripe. so... do you think I need one? and how would I even get one
